title: Petrify
description: Stairs, slabs and walls for all that is stone!
body: Petrify is a mod that adds stairs, slabs, walls and other variations for all stone-related blocks that don't normally have them, while trying to keep a vanilla feeling by adding other stone-based building blocks. **Parity blocks** (stairs, slabs and walls) added for: - Stone and Smooth Stone - Granite, Andesite and Diorite - Tuff - Dripstone and Diorite - Prismarine Bricks and Dark Prismarine - Sandstone and Red Sandstone - Packed Mud - Basalt - Quartz - End Stone Other **new blocks** and respective variants added: - Stone Brick and Mossy Stone Brick Door/Trapdoor - Granite, Andesite and Diorite Tiles - Smooth/Polished/Chiseled Tuff and Tuff Tiles - Basalt Tiles - Polished Glowstone and Glowstone Bricks - End Stone Tiles and Chiseled End Stone - Blackstone and Gilded Blackstone Door/Trapdoor - Red Nether Brick Fence (!) Petrify Discord server: https://discord.gg/mQKMZ2XgDd
